### Fix 3
Lines: 13, 19
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

  componentName: Button
  parentName: ActionListItem

Component: Button
Prop: icon

**Fix 1 (Button.variant type changed):** Lines 15, 19 are referenced but those lines contain `networkPolicyFromK8sResource` and `import { resourcePathFromModel }` — there's no `Button` component used anywhere in this file. The `Button` import doesn't even exist. The line references in the incident context don't match Button usage. This fix is not applicable to this file.

**Fix 2 (Modal family migration):** Lines 10, 23 are referenced but those lines contain `useNetworkingTranslation` and `NetworkPolicyFormDenyCheckBoxses` imports. There's no `Modal` component used anywhere in this file. No Modal import exists. This fix is not applicable to this file.

**Fix 4 (PageSection variant light → default):** Line 105 has `<PageSection variant={PageSectionVariants.light}>`. The value `"light"` is no longer valid. Per the rule, `"default"` is the appropriate replacement for `"light"`.

structuredContent.stdout:
7:import { Form, PageSection, PageSectionVariants, Title } from '@patternfly/react-core';
105:    <PageSection variant={PageSectionVariants.light}>

content.text:
Only Fix 4 is applicable. The `PageSectionVariants.light` value needs to change to `PageSectionVariants.default`. Since `default` is a reserved word in JS, I need to check if `PageSectionVariants` enum has a `default` key or if I should use a string literal instead.

In PatternFly v6, `PageSectionVariants` may not include `default` as a valid enum key (since `default` is a JS reserved word). The safest approach is to use the string literal `"default"` directly. This also means `PageSectionVariants` may no longer be needed as an import.

Let me check if `PageSectionVariants` is used anywhere else in the file:

`PageSectionVariants` is used only twice: once in the import (line 7) and once on line 105. After changing to a string literal, I can remove `PageSectionVariants` from the import.

Now let me apply the change:

arguments.before: import { Form, PageSection, PageSectionVariants, Title } from '@patternfly/react-core';
